ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer who placed the order */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" TEXT /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "order_line_number" INTEGER /* Line number within the order */,
  "sales" TEXT /* Total sales revenue from the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date when the order will be delivered */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "qtr_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the quarter when the order was placed */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the month when the order was placed */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the year when the order was placed */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line of the ordered product */,
  "msrp" TEXT /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the order was placed */,
  "deal_size" TEXT /* Size of the deal */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order after tax and discounts */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales representative who processed the order */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_product_code FOREIGN KEY ("product_code") REFERENCES product_details ("product_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_details" (
  "product_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line of the product */,
  "msrp" TEXT /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the product is sold */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales representative operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)
